finding_results.notes: Added documented recon coaching action and explicit laundry-only hold with temporary audit sticker removal, then restored access after clean shifts; end beat now explicitly names that the hold is off when extra audit coverage is accepted.
Replaced abstract affair shorthand with observable memory details (bathroom mirror, Marisol, unanswered call) and explicit harm naming to Nora and June (mortgage burden and rationed meal swipes).

Voicemail now includes an unhedged emotional admission (shame and missing June) that is not reduced to work/money reporting, and immediate aftermath remains embodied rather than logistical self-management.
Removed recurring 'landed harder' formula and replaced it with a Reno-specific physical reaction tied to Eli's cracked rib and work context.

Separated supervisor idiolects: Deena now uses floor/body-mechanics enforcement language; Tasha now frames leverage through paperwork/process in colloquial bureaucratic diction; Kendra now uses reconciliation/variance language tied to audit integrity. Repeated shared threat-template sentence shape was removed across the cited spans.
Added explicit Eli interiority in the intake stretch via bodily pain response, compliance self-monitoring, and self-implicating reaction to termination language while preserving scene pace.
Replaced repetitive nod beats with differentiated actions (desk-edge pressure, can-tip directional cue, two-finger salute) to vary subtext and physical behavior under stress/fatigue.
Reframed side-character entrances to lead with immediate workflow pressure and task movement, keeping accessory detail secondary rather than intro-leading.

pass_summaries.summary: All four pass-scoped structural/craft findings were addressed in-place in chapter 14, with a concrete managerial status change arc, stronger affair-accountability specificity, a less hedged emotional voicemail beat, and removal of repeated impact formula language.
Addressed the dialogue/idiolect/cadence finding by separating Deena, Tasha, and Kendra voice signatures and pressure syntax while preserving chapter continuity and scene consequences.

All packet findings were resolved with constrained line-level revisions: opening interiority density restored, reaction-beat variety improved by removing nod defaults, and side-character introductions shifted to pressure-first entrances while preserving continuity and chapter voice.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=8, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
